rationale.fidelity: The two decision stages, information sets, exogenous demand state, expected-cost objective, and both reservation and recourse limits are mapped exactly.
rationale.managerial_framing: The actor, trigger, advance-versus-recourse trade-off, hedge mechanism, and feasible policy counterfactual are concrete and decision relevant.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No literature or contribution claim is made, appropriately matching the absence of scholarly evidence.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Scenario probabilities are explicitly labeled assumptions requiring calibration and stress testing, and no out-of-model performance claim is made.
rationale.prose_clarity: The explanation is precise and well organized, though longer and more templated than the task requires and contains encoding noise.
rationale.overall: An excellent, fully faithful two-stage framing with no hard failure; only presentation economy and unavailable scholarly grounding limit the score.
